category_sources: Official VideoLAN libbluray page says libbluray is an open-source library for Blu-Ray Disc playback.
source_facts.description says Blu-Ray disc playback library for media players like VLC.
display_name_sources: Official VideoLAN developer page uses the display name libbluray.
docs_sources: Official VideoLAN developer page includes a documentation section for libbluray API documentation.
Official VideoLAN-hosted Doxygen site provides libbluray API documentation.
repo_sources: Official VideoLAN developer page gives git clone https://code.videolan.org/videolan/libbluray.git and says source can be browsed at code.videolan.org.
tags_sources: Official VideoLAN page describes navigation, playlist parsing, menus, and BD-J features.
source_facts.description identifies Blu-Ray playback for media players like VLC.
